nasb.text: “Behold, the days are coming,” declares the Lord, “that I will punish all who are circumcised and yet uncircumcised—

esv.text: “Behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when I will punish all those who are circumcised merely in the flesh—

cnv.text: “看哪！日子快到，我必懲罰所有只在身體受過割禮，內心卻未受割禮的人，

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“看啊，时候将到，我要惩罚所有只在身体受过割礼的人，
